mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) count, NVL(SUM(totalMoney - cancelAmount), 0) total FROM productOrder WHERE orderState != 6 AND TO_CHAR(orderDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
SELECT COUNT(*) count, NVL(SUM(productMoney - cancelAmount), 0) total FROM orderDetail o JOIN product p ON o.productNum = p.productNum WHERE p.brandNum = #{brandNum}
SELECT COUNT(*) count, NVL(SUM(productMoney - cancelAmount), 0) total FROM orderDetail o JOIN product p ON o.productNum = p.productNum WHERE p.categoryNum = #{categoryNum}

SELECT total, userId FROM ( SELECT NVL(SUM(totalMoney - cancelAmount), 0) AS total, userId FROM (SELECT totalMoney, cancelAmount, userId FROM productOrder p JOIN member1 m ON p.memberIdx = m.memberIdx) GROUP BY userId ORDER BY total DESC) ORDER BY total DESC
